articles.title: Cache public container images in your Azure Container Registry with Terraform
articles.description: Cache public container images in your Azure Container Registry with TerraformIaC•Microsoft Azure  / 11mo When running your application on Azure Kubernetes Services, it’s a best practice to store the container images you need in an Azure Container Registry.
